languages.text: {n}Поджав тонкие губы, капитан бросает на вас испепеляющий взгляд и молча уходит, чеканя каждый шаг.{/n}
{n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Поджав тонкие губы, капитан бросает на вас испепеляющий взгляд и молча уходит, чеканя каждый шаг.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}
{n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}
{n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mientras aprieta sus delgados labios, el capitán te lanza una mirada hosca y se marcha sin decir palabra. Sus botas golpean el suelo con cada paso.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mientras aprieta sus delgados labios, el capitán te lanza una mirada hosca y se marcha sin decir palabra. Sus botas golpean el suelo con cada paso.{/n}

languages.text: {n}上尉紧抿着薄薄的嘴唇，怒视你一眼，一言不发地走开了。每一步，他的靴子都重重地敲击着地面。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}上尉紧抿着薄薄的嘴唇，怒视你一眼，一言不发地走开了。每一步，他的靴子都重重地敲击着地面。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ses fines lèvres pincées, le capitaine vous foudroie du regard avant de tourner les talons sans mot dire, ses bottes martelant le sol à chaque pas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ses fines lèvres pincées, le capitaine vous foudroie du regard avant de tourner les talons sans mot dire, ses bottes martelant le sol à chaque pas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İnce dudaklarını büzerek sana ters ters bakan yüzbaşı, her adımda çizmelerini yere vurarak tek kelime etmeden uzaklaşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İnce dudaklarını büzerek sana ters ters bakan yüzbaşı, her adımda çizmelerini yere vurarak tek kelime etmeden uzaklaşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Captain schürzt seine schmalen Lippen, funkelt dich an und stolziert mit seinen schweren Stiefeln ohne ein weiteres Wort davon.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Captain schürzt seine schmalen Lippen, funkelt dich an und stolziert mit seinen schweren Stiefeln ohne ein weiteres Wort davon.{/n}

languages.text: {n}薄く唇を結んで、船長はあなたを睨みつけ、もう一言も言わずに去っていった。彼のブーツは、一歩一歩地面を叩く。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}薄く唇を結んで、船長はあなたを睨みつけ、もう一言も言わずに去っていった。彼のブーツは、一歩一歩地面を叩く。{/n}
